entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content: EXCEPT IN

entry.title: While doing results recording in QE51n, I could not locate the option to copy inspection results.
entry.content:
I have followed the steps below to copy results from one inspection lot to another.

Copy Inspection Lot Results from One Lot to Other ... - SAP Community

Can you please provide some suggestions? Please find the attachments also.

entry.title: Using accounts.search with deep structure in data object
entry.content:
Hi all!

I need some advice about searching accounts using accounts.search REST API inside a 'deep' data object structure from account schema.

Having these accounts I need to retrieve only accounts with 'eventId' = event1 and status = 3 at the same time. Then, I would like to retrieve only account "UID": "C" as result, but I am retrieving all the accounts.

{
"UID": "A",
"data": {
"events": [
{
"status": "5",
"eventId": "event1",
},
{
"status": "3",
"eventId": "event2",
}]}},
{
"UID": "B",
"data": {
"events": [
{
"status": "2",
"eventId": "event1",
}]}},
{
"UID": "C",
"data": {
"events": [
{
"status": "3",
"eventId": "event1",
}]}}

This is the query param used in account.search API call:

SELECT UID FROM accounts where data.events.status="3" and data.events.eventId="event1"

Thanks!!

entry.title: SAP and Information Systems Research: Reflections on HICSS 2024
entry.content:
A tropical setting and an assembly of leading scholars and professionals are what encapsulate the essence of this year's Hawaii International Conference on System Sciences (HICSS). The annual HICSS serves as a global platform for researchers, scholars, and practitioners to share insights, foster collaboration, and discuss the latest developments in system sciences. As one of the largest and most prestigious Information Systems conferences, HICSS drew approximately 1300 scientists and 760 research papers. Notably, two SAP-affiliated researchers contributed to the conference and presented two research papers on adopting Artificial Intelligence (AI) in business networks – whereas one paper was even nominated for the Best Paper Award.

Artificial Intelligence at the Core of Industrial Innovation

The conference revolved around several important themes, including advances in information technology, decision analytics, collaborative systems, and AI. This year, the role of AI in the future of industry has taken center stage. In his keynote, Dr. Christopher Nguyen, Co-Founder of Aitomatic – a leading tech company specializing in industrial generative AI - provided insights from firsthand experiences. Dr. Nguyen delved into real-world applications, showcasing the transformative power of AI and elucidated how AI transforms work dynamics. He emphasized a strategic approach, focusing on the ethical considerations surrounding AI deployment with the need to prioritize human-centric values, and stressed the importance of upholding ethical standards and core human values.

The Adoption of AI within Business Networks

In collaboration with the Technical University of Munich (TUM), two SAP-affiliated researchers had the opportunity to present their research on the organizational adoption of the emerging technology “Federated Machine Learning” at the conference. They first delved into the challenges and influencing factors for the successful adoption of Federated Machine Learning and then demonstrated a decision-support tool for the technology selection process.

Working at the intersection of AI and collaborative business networks, the researchers presented a comprehensive overview of influences, stressing the importance of four pivotal factors:

  • Collaboration Management
  • Organizational Readiness
  • Data Quality
  • Data/System Interoperability

Effective collaboration management ensures smooth coordination among participants, while organizational readiness measures the preparedness of a company to embrace collaborative Machine Learning. Data and system interoperability facilitate the seamless integration of diverse datasets and technologies, fostering a collaborative environment. Finally, the importance of data quality cannot be overstated, as it directly influences the accuracy and reliability of AI outcomes.

Building on these insights, the researchers continued to demonstrate a decision-support tool designed to support practitioners throughout the intricate technology selection process for Federated Machine Learning. By offering a structured framework, they empower decision-makers to evaluate suitability and complexity, considering the most crucial success factors. Moreover, the tool extends its utility to assess organizational readiness, ensuring that the chosen technology aligns with the organization's capabilities and objectives.

SAP at the Forefront of Innovation

Engaging in conferences and fostering collaborative endeavors with leading research institutes is a crucial driver to staying at the forefront of the fast-paced realm of technological innovation. Access to cutting-edge research, emerging talent, and a continuous learning environment ensures that SAP remains adaptive and well-positioned for the future. Notably, these publications and contributions to HICSS resulted from the SAP@TUM collaboration.

Hereby, SAP and TUM collaborate under the Industry-on-Campus strategy, fostering a mutually beneficial partnership. At the heart of this alliance is the SAP@TUM Collaboration Lab, a joint initiative facilitating applied research, knowledge exchange, and co-innovation. The collaboration provides a platform for SAP employees and TUM members to gain insights into ongoing projects, scientific research, and the vibrant work environment at SAP.

SAP University Alliances

SAP also maintains close relationships with universities around the world. Over time, we have built a global academic community, consisting of 2,3 thousand-member institutions in 115 countries. This program is called the SAP University Alliances Program and is meant to enable academia to inspire‚ and educate the next generation of talent and to collaborate on impactful and innovative research together. Especially for the latter, there are central efforts to keep the experienced researchers who are already involved in collaborative projects in the SAP ecosystem and to retain their expertise and let it flow back into the organization. You can find more information about this in the SAP Research Community.

On top of that, we deliberately point towards job opportunities for students and graduates at SAP or at SAP partners and customers.

entry.title: Re: SAP Partner Delivery Groups: Benefits and Resources
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

Once the confirmation form is launched as per the workflow confirmation status will be updated manually in the system, as per the workflow if the status is not updated in the particular timeline after that the status confirmation must be auto updated without manual intervention.

Is there any feasibility on the same, please let me know.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Logging Service 入門
entry.content:
@rasai 様

ブログ記事拝読させていただきました。
弊社のデモ環境を使って検証し、従来のALSで利用出来ていた機能がCLSにも実装されていることまでは確認できました。

CLSからの追加機能について質問させていただきたいのですが、
BTP内のアプリケーション以外のサービス（例：HANA CloudやWorkflow等）のログも
CLSに集約してエラー時に通知するようなことは可能でしょうか？
（ブログ内に「通知機能はSAP Alert Notifiation Serviceなどの他サービスとの連携も可能」という記載がありましたが
連携の方向がSAP Alert Notifiation Service→CLS、CLS→SAP Alert Notifiation Serviceのどちらなのか分からなかったため）

現在アプリケーションのログをALSで、サービスログをSAP Alert Notifiation Serviceで管理しているので
それがCLSに一元化できるのであればメリットがあると感じております。
ご回答のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: Freigth Unit Time Conflict Execution Block Inbound Sc...
entry.content: Hi Rogerio, thanks we managed the behavior with the condition. Now the acceptable delivery date/time is empty on the Freight Unit and because of this no time conflict anymore exists.

entry.title: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CDS view without the use of Virtual Elements ?
entry.content:
I have to read the TDLINE value for one of the Text Field in FB03 using READ_TEXT Function Module.

Any approach/alternative to use 'READ_TEXT' in CDS View without using Virtual Elements ?

entry.title: Re: SAP and Information Systems Research: Reflections on HICSS 2024
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing @TobiasM ! I couldn't think of a better place for a conference 😃

Have there been any preliminary examples of potential AI decision-making impacting a specific business process? Eg. What processes can we expect AI to have an influence over first? (Or is it too early to tell?)

I'd love to get some subject matter experts from this conference on the SAP Learning Insights Podcast.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Currency Calculation incorrect - Why?
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

thanks for your reply ... in the meanwhile I got some more information... and this is obviously the root cause.

It is a S4 Demo system, where I loaded the TCUR* data from.

There, the settings in TCURN obviously lead to the fact, that the following currency pair is used:

So, here From: EUR - To: USD - 100 USD / 0,93980 = 106,40 EUR.

TCURN is like:

Either line 1 or line 4 apply, since there is no entry for: From: USD - To: EUR.

I have never had this kind of customizing... I always could rely on the TCURR entries "From & To" 🙂

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content: Dear Pardha Reddy, as mentioned via email I have forwarded your question to our PTW experts Arvind and Christian. Hope they have time to answer. Best regards, Gerhard

entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How to create a sequence number in SAP Datasphere transformation flow just like how we create in Informatica?

Thanks,
Samrat Muddasani

entry.title: E-Learning Series: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the release of six-new E-Learnings available to help guide you through SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration.

These e-Learnings are brought to you by the SAP Enterprise Support value maps for SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite.

Value maps provide self-paced learnings, expert-led live sessions, collaborative forums, and access to SAP experts; all included as part of your SAP Cloud subscription contract.

What´s new?

HXM Integration Strategy & Overview 

This session shows an overview of the HXM integration strategy, focusing on the case for HR integration, integration tools, pre-package integration and Intelligent suite integration.

SAP SuccessFactors Integration with SAP Solutions - Full Cloud and Hybrid Deployment

In this session we discuss the deployment options for integrating SAP SuccessFactors with both other SAP or third-party solutions focusing on the Full Cloud and Hybrid deployment option.

We discuss Integration tools and pre-packaged integrations for standard business processes with other SAP or third-party solutions. We cover integration with various SAP solutions such as SAP ERP/ SAP S/4HANA, Cloud Integration, SAP Concur, and EC to EC Payroll Integration. (Point to Point).

Finally, we provide information on integration with SAP Fieldglass for Intelligent Enterprise processes such as Total Workforce Management.

SAP One Domain Model Master Data Integration with SAP SuccessFactors

In this session we discuss the Suite Quality SAP One Domain Model, Master Data Integration including guiding principles and principles. Finally, we show how to setup Master Data Integration with SAP SuccessFactors.

Migration of Data from SAP ERP / S/4 HANA on-premise HCM to SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Using Infoporter

In this session we discuss the migration of Data from SAP ERP / SAP S/4HANA on-premise HCM to SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Using Infoporter. We provide information on the migration including concept, strategy, considerations, and tools - Info porter Infoporter and Business Integration Builder.

Overview on 3rd Third-Party Integration and Cloud Integration Best Practices

In this session we discuss the best practices for integration of SAP SuccessFactors and 3rd third-party systems.

Migrating SAP Jam to SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone

In this session we provide an overview on the migration process from SAP Jam to SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone. We provide information on the SAP Jam Migration Mapping including which Jam capabilities are kept and converted in the Work Zone setup, which features are not supported, removed SAP Jam features and recommendations for customers.

Finally, we plan to develop a Learning Program to include the above e-learnings with a digital badge to be achieved after completion of the program. Stay tuned for further information!

Where to access?

3 Easy Steps:  

  1.  One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required  
  2. Access value maps
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support value map for SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite

Once in the value map, we welcome you to collaborate in our forums, ask questions or “Request a Call” to speak with one of our experts for further help. Value maps are easy to navigate but an on-boarding call allows us to tailor the conversation to suit your needs and highlight specific content for you.  

Whether you are delving into talent management, optimizing HR processes, or enhancing employee experiences, our value map will guide you through this comprehensive suite.

Got a question about the value maps, or our content?
Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or contact us: sapesvaluemaps@sap.com

Best regards

Alejandro Azcárate

entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content:
Hi Sandra! Thanks for you answer but it seems that it is not working.

I tried 

filter #( productions EXCEPT IN articles where ArticleId = ArticleId )

and got an error "The operation requires a key (SORTED or HASHED) on table column(s)". None of the table is a sorted or hashed table.

entry.title: Re: GL issue
entry.content:
Hi @AK6 

The GL Account can be marked for deletion from FS00. The below documentation explains the same:

Marking a G/L Account Master Record for Deletion | SAP Help Portal

The fact that you see line items in FBL3N means that in the master data, the GL is probably not marked for deletion and is being posted to.

Thanks & regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CDS view without the use of Virtual Elements
entry.content:
Hello galap17,

you can check this Blog: 

https://blogs.sap.com/2016/03/25/my-cds-view-self-study-tutorial-part-6-consume-table-function-in-cds-view/

Maybe this is a way, how you can solve your problem.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Simplified Guide to Installing Universal Windows Platform (UWP) Apps in the 'AppData\Local\Packages'
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

as many already noticed there has been some confusion regarding the installation directories for the Windows Client from the Microsoft Store.

Unlike traditional installations, which typically use directories like "Program Files" or "AppData\Roaming," the Windows Client utilizes the Universal Windows Platform (UWP) and is stored at "AppData\Local\Packages."

Please refer to the SAP Note for more information: https://me.sap.com/notes/0003440691

 

 

Thanks & Best Regards

Ziad Mamlouk

entry.title: Re: SAP UX Innovations in Public Cloud Products, Joule, AI, Entry Points, Apple Vision Pro and more
entry.content: Love the summary, very exciting what is possible and what is coming. Your time changing demo video has a small logical error because Chicago and Dallas are in the same time zone, neither of which is eastern standard time.

entry.title: MB52 overview + posting date to a specific location
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

I need to create an overview of the current stock levels within the different storage locations and to be able to find per itemline the quantity, storage location and the last posting date. I don't know how to combine the posting date with the MB52 overview.

Is there any way/existing report that could help me?

kind regards,

entry.title: Re: E-Mail attached documents linked in QM02 (Quality Notifications)
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

thanks for your reply, I´ve tried your code using on source a QM notification with attachments to a new one with no attachments and it´s not working at all, no links are read from source notification:

CALL METHOD cl_binary_relation=>read_links_of_binrel
        EXPORTING
          is_object   = gs_lporb
          ip_relation = 'ATTA'
          ip_role     = 'GOSAPPLOBJ'
        IMPORTING
          et_links    = lt_links.

INSTID 290000000141
TYPEID BUS2078
CATID BO

Can be a problem with the type of attachments? I mean, how do I know are "ATTA"? 

 

EDIT

Of course your code works, but not for all attachments I´m afraid, ones which are in SRGBTBREL with ATTA and id = notif number are copied properly, but ones which are manually attached into the notification (QM02) do not appear in SRGBTBREL table nor copied with that code.
Do you know where are stored of how to copy manual attachments?
Thanks!

Thx!

entry.title: Re: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CD...
entry.content: Any blog/solution which has logic of READ_TEXT in AMDP for reference ?

entry.title: Re: SAP authorization check for tables in Se16, se16n, se...
entry.content: Thanks a lot, this was really useful

entry.title: Re: Saving data from SAC story to BigQuery?
entry.content:
Hello Peter,

I cannot tell you the solution on your problem, but maybe check this blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/export-data-from-sac-model-to-odata-service/ba-p/13392765

In the first screenshot you can see all Export options for a SAC model.

If you are familiar with OData then you might find a solution 😉

At the moment SAP Datasphere is more propagated... there you have options to export to Big Query.

The Problem is that still today, the planning models reside in SAC and not in Datasphere.

This weakness is hopefully gone by the end of the year - hopefully 😉

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content: With FILTER, articles MUST BE a sorted or hashed table, whatever it's IN or EXCEPT IN. See ABAP documentation for more information.

entry.title: Re: Any approach to use Function Module 'READ_TEXT' in CDS view without the use of Virtual Elements
entry.content: Out of curiosity, why do you want to do it "without using Virtual Elements" ?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

Standing at the midpoint of my career, I am eager to embrace the SAP domain wholeheartedly. The SAP Digital Skills Initiative presents an invaluable opportunity for me to learn, grow, and obtain certification, allowing me to propel my career forward in the SAP landscape.

With utmost gratitude, I seek your support and acceptance of my application. Being selected to join this initiative would not only fulfill my aspirations but also enable me to contribute significantly to the SAP domain.

I identify as a person in the below categories:

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
First generation college students.

Thank you for considering my application, and I eagerly await the chance to participate in this life-changing opportunity.

entry.content: Sorry I'm not an ABAP Developer... I even need help for the table function 😉

entry.title: Resize nested table with QR Code in Adobe Form
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I'm having a few problems with an Adobe Form, because I have to display a table where one field is a QR Code and another one is a nested table:

The problem is that the QR Code is always top aligned or, if I make it bigger, the same happens with the rows of the nested table (when I have 1 or 2 rows):

If I resize the height of the nested table rows, there is too much space between a line and the next one:

Is there a way too keep everything aligned? I tried with sub modules and by removing the "h" parameter from the XML source, but it did not worked.
It would be good to center align the nested table rows, but I'm not able to do it because options are grayed:

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Build Your SAP BTP Tech Radar with LeanIX
entry.content: This is very cool to see! I do have a bias (I work for TW, and was involved in publishing some of the earlier volumes) - but I believe the inspiration for the radar is here: https://www.thoughtworks.com/radar. The the https://www.thoughtworks.com/radar/faq section talks about the approach we've taken, both in creating it, and in recommending how other businesses can do the same. It's very interesting to see that this can be done directly in LeanIX - I like that it creates a proximity to other assets, which helps ensure that it remains top of mind. It also means that it would be easy to update it as things change - although I think that one of the benefits of having a more 'static' document is that it can encourage a periodic deeper reflection as a team.

entry.title: Re: How to create(similar) widgets available in MS Excel...
entry.content:
Hello akhilgs,

I cannot provide a solution for your topic, but have a look into these Blogs:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/build-a-custom-widget-in-sap-analytics-cloud-analytics-application/ba-p/13432508 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/interface-sap-analytics-cloud-google-gauge-custom-widget-with-rgb-led/ba-p/13448460 

Maybe this gives some hints, how to solve this best?!

BR, Martin

entry.title: Unveiling the Future: The first role-based certification for SAP Analytics Cloud is live!
entry.content:
In the dynamic world of data analytics, staying ahead of the curve is not just an advantage – it's a necessity. Enter the SAP Certified Associate - Data Analyst - SAP Analytics Cloud, the first role-based certification in the analytics area that promises to set you up for career success. 

Embrace the Power of SAP Analytics Cloud 

Picture this – a comprehensive certification that covers the entire spectrum of a data analyst's role within SAP Analytics Cloud. From planning and modeling to story design, predictive analytics, and administration – this certification is designed to empower you with the skills needed to navigate the intricate landscape of SAP Analytics Cloud.  

What Sets This Certification Apart? 

This certification isn't just about passing an exam on a solution; it's about mastering a full spectrum of tools and techniques that make you a well-rounded SAP Analytics Cloud expert. The comprehensive curriculum ensures that you not only understand the theoretical aspects but also gain practical insights that can be applied in real-world scenarios. 

Your Journey Through SAP Analytics Cloud 

Dive deep into planning strategies, master the art of modeling, craft compelling data stories, explore the world of predictive analytics, and understand the administrative aspects – this certification leaves no stone unturned.  

Get started by learning the basics with these free Learning Journeys to prepare for the certification: 

Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud  

Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud 

Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning  

Stand out and Begin Your Analytics Journey! 

The future of data analytics is here, and it starts with you. Visit the certification page to explore resources, understand the exam structure, and embark on a journey toward becoming a certified SAP Analytics Cloud Data Analyst. Seize the opportunity, and let your analytics journey begin! 

Are you already certified in SAP Analytics Cloud and want to see what changes are coming for you? Just visit the certification transformation page.

Your future in analytics awaits – are you ready to embrace it?

entry.title: Document flow status remains open in Advanced Returns Management
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working in an S4/HANA system and I have the following process:

  • Create a RE2 sales order with reference to a OR sales order for item 10 let's say
  • Select Follow-Up Activity 0007( Direct Shipment to Vendor ) so the stock is not posted in our inventory
  • After saving the document, the following documents are created automatically in the returns overview:

And also this is how the processing status looks like:

As of right now, the process is successful but one curious thing happens when I check the Document Flow in VA02:

As you can see, the status is still Open even though the whole process is finished. Do you have any ideas as to why this might happen what should I look into? I want the status to be completed or at least not open.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Using RAP to build Side-by-Side extensions
entry.content: No, your custom CDS view will be clearly separated from the Core.

entry.title: Re: Approval proces for production order.
entry.content: it is not possible to control from MTO. however it will be controlled from sales order, billing if the client is exceeding the credit limit assigned to him. controlling from MTO may disturb the manufacturing process you may require to process MTOs for other customers even if they have unpaid invoices...

entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content: Okay thanks. Then filter doesn't help. In most cases I don't have a sorted or hashed table. When I have to create one and map the data, the implementation effort is higher than doing a nested loop. Do you know if there is another inline syntax achiving the desired result?

entry.title: How to Add Custom Header Field to Sales Document Item Query
entry.content:
In Sales, SAP has delivered some analytical reports based on item query CDS views. Such reports contain item-level dimensions and measurements. For example, the Sales Quotations - Flexible Analysis app uses the C_SalesQuotationItemQry (Sales Quotation Item - Query) view.

To add a custom item field to such a standard item-level report, you can simply use the Custom Fields app to enable it for the corresponding analytics data source. For example, the data source can be the item query C_SalesQuotationItemQry. Then the custom item field appears in the Sales Quotations - Flexible Analysis app. However, if you want to use a custom header field for item-level analysis, you should create a custom query and more steps are involved. This blog describes how to achieve this, that is, to add a custom header field to a custom item query (taking sales quotation as an example).

Overview

Step

App Used

Step Description

Remarks

1

Custom Fields

Create a custom header field and enable it for an analytics data source.

The data source is a basic interface view, for example, I_Sales Quotation.

2

Custom CDS Views

Create a custom cube (based on the standard item cube) and add the custom field to your cube.

The standard cube is I_SalesQuotationItemCube_2, which is the underlying view of the standard query (C_SalesQuotationItemQry).

3

Custom Analytical Queries

Create a custom query based on the custom cube.

Compared with the standard query, your custom query additionally contains the custom header field.

Note: To know how to find the queries used by analytical apps and how to find the underlying cube of a query, see question 3 in FAQs about Apps and CDS Views in Sales Analytics. For more information, see CDS Views for Sales and search for app descriptions on SAP Help Portal.

Procedure

1. Create a custom header field via the Custom Fields app using the business context Sales: Sales Document.

2. On the Analytics tab, enable your header custom field (YY1_SD_H_TEXT) to the data source I_SALESQUOTATION.

       3. In the Custom CDS Views app, create a custom cube based on I_SalesQuotationItemCube_2 (Sales Quotation Item - Cube), which is the underlying view of C_SalesQuotationItemQry (Sales Quotation Item - Query). Add your custom field (YY1_SD_H_TEXT) to the custom cube.

     Note: This field resides under association _SalesQuotation.

         

4. In the Custom Analytical Queries app, create a custom query based on your custom cube. For more information, see How to create analytical query from custom CDS View.

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Phase Model in Maintenance Management

This was really helpful because after the migration of blog posts onto a new technical platform the original link did not worked anymore in the blog post. i have this error  @David_Chaviano

entry.title: Re: GL issue
entry.content: Thank you for your response. I have checked in table SKA1 and the same GL was marked for deletion on 5 Jan 2024 and still entries was getting posted to the same GL. I have checked all the configuration in FS00 and all seems to be right. Please advise

entry.title: Re: Paramter Check in Db2 (db6)
entry.content:
Hi Joachim,
yes, this is somewhat strange. For this parameter the value is displayed differently via "get db cfg" and by the corresponding table functions.
We will need to check and discuss this.
Regards
               Frank

> db2 get db cfg for FMH | grep ACT_SORTMEM_LIMIT
Activity Sort Memory Limit (ACT_SORTMEM_LIMIT) = NONE

> db2 " SELECT NAME, VARCHAR(VALUE, 20) AS VALUE, MEMBER, DBPARTITIONNUM FROM TABLE(SYSPROC.DB_GET_CFG(-2)) ORDER BY NAME, MEMBER " | grep -i act
act_sortmem_limit 100 0 0
mon_act_metrics BASE 0 0
section_actuals NONE 0 0
self_tuning_mem ON (Active) 0 0

entry.title: Re: CoCd &, ledger 0L: First Close the fiscal years befor...
entry.content:
Hi Monali,

 

see KBA for explanation https://me.sap.com/notes/3436452

 

regards,

Norbert

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
{
  "type": "sap.s4.beh.purchaserequisition.v1.PurchaseRequisition.Changed.v1",
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "source": "nedgia/eventmeshdev/dev",
  "id": "AA06tkhWHt6FoCOmSZ/6+Q==",
  "time": "2023-06-27T15:40:17Z",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
  "PurchaseRequisition": "60004767"
  }
  }

 

What a interesting challenge Antonio! Looking forward to next weeks!!

entry.title: List of all inactive objects BW/4Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

is there an option to find all inactive objects in a SAP BW/4 HANA system?
We are actually preparing an upgrade to SAP BW/4 HANA 2023.

Thanks for you help in advance.

Nina

entry.title: Re: MultiProvider/CompositeProvider scenario in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Mandar_Damle,

the counterpart in SAP Datasphere for a Multiprovider/Composite is a so called FACT View.

It is a graphical or SQL view containing one or more unions. See an example:

On the left you can have different other fact views (views which simulate your previous cubes - they read data from an underlying local table or another view).

On the right side you have your output structure (the final fact view), where you do an association of master data attributes or text. This is a manual task, for each and every record field, where you want to have attributes or texts in your reports.

The problem is, you cannot have more than two views in one union, so you need as many as you have source views. And the automatic assignment works only if your technical names (I guess) in the underlying tables or views are identically. Otherwise it is a manual mapping.

If you don't have all fields in all source providers, you can generate new blank columns with the F(X) Symbol (see above).

This final view is the basis to build an Analytic model on top, which reflects the former Query.

In SAC, you don't replicate the Fact view anymore, like you did with the BW Query, but you build a story directly on top of the Analytic Model. There is no additional object in SAC from Datasphere, only your SAC story.

Hope this helps,

Martin

entry.title: Re: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Provider contract XX does not exist
entry.content:
Hi Elena,

You do not need to create your subscription via a solution order in order for the provider contract to be created.

Regarding the error "Invalid time zone CET", please note that not all time zones in Subscription Billing are mapped to time zones in SAP S/4HANA. Please refer to the documentation Replication of Subscriptions to Provider Contracts. This error is currently a reason why no provider contract is being created for your subscription.

Regards,
Sarah

entry.title: Re: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content: Hi, Thank you this helped a lot. I see data in RSINFO doesnt hold anything related to Finance document. However there is finance data in BW. Is this interrelated. If so how is the data getting tranfered from SAP ECC to SAP BW

entry.title: Re: BADi to open APO planning book in edit mode with a se...
entry.content:
Hi @Ben9,

I am still not sure about your final aim but you can influence the standard behaviour of opening a planning book in display mode first w/ a BADI.

The following BADI can be used to directly open any DP or SNP planning book/view per default in EDIT mode.

/SAPAPO/IF_EX_SDP_INTERACT~DVIEW_DISPLAY_MODE_SET

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: Does the endpoint GET /api/v1/quotes/{quoteId} get da...
entry.content: Issue fixed on CPQ February release 2402.

entry.title: Re: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content:
It depends on your version, and you also have to take into account overly creative developers.

On BW side, RSA1, you can 'Display Data Flow Upwards' from any InfoProvider

entry.title: Crystal reports in ubuntu? / Crystal reports en ubuntu?
entry.content:
Tengo unas facturas hechas en crystal reports, quiero saber si en el ordenador ubuntu que tengo puedo instalar algo de crystal reports o alguna otra aplicacion para poder visualizar en una aplicacion web los .rpt que se generan, mi proyecto esta hecho en php.
 
I have some invoices made in crystal reports, I want to know if in the ubuntu computer that I have I can install something of crystal reports or some other application to be able to visualize in a web application the .rpt that are generated, my project is made in php.

entry.title: SAP ECC to SAP BW data transfer
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is data getting transfered from SAP ECC to SAP BW. In we02 we can see RSINFO and RSRQST. But these do not contain the finance data. But I believe SAP ECC uses RSRQST as a request to send the data to SAP ECC. Am I right in assuming this? Both systems are 7.4 version.

 

However I am unable to understand how is the getting transfered to SAP BW. I dont see any idocs in we02 or messages in SXMB_MONI. 

 

Please help me understand how the data flow happens, how to view the data flow is happening.

entry.title: Looking for a global setting to make WebI reports remember selected contexts
entry.content:
Hi there,

We have a lot of WebI reports that for one reason or another request the universe context for the query.

Once the context for a query is select it should remain as the logic and purpose of the query has not changed.

I am looking for a way to make the context selection persist even when the query is refreshed, but globally for the entire system.

As part of the query options there is a checkbox for "Reset contexts on refresh" that is checked by default, and unchecking this does exactly what we want, however we have thousands of documents and would like to know if there is a global setting that can be toggled.

Thanks in advance,

Kyle

Do you have any recommendations for which courses are suitable given their current situation? E.g. is this course relevant also to Greenfield?:

  • Conversion of Accounting for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Handling Unit Label Printing Through PPF in SAP EWM
entry.content: Hi, thank you for the confirmation. a custom PPF could be an option yes. I was wondering if we can force the PPF HU trigger through a BADI call at goods receipt posting. Does this seem as a good practice option ?

entry.title: Asset Management as one of the main topics at the SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference
entry.content:
In April, the next SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference will take place in Seville. More than ever, Asset Management will be one of the focus topics with 12 presentations from customers, partners, and SAP. In addition, several microforums will discuss further asset management topics.

You might already know this picture of the whole asset life-cycle and the related solutions from SAP and partners. All solutions marked in red will be covered with presentations during the conference. In addition, the respective partners are shown.

In many of these presentations customers will be on stage to describe their experiences, successes and challenges with the solutions. These customers include

  • Chevron
  • ConocoPhillips
  • ENEL
  • Emirates Nuclear Energy Corporation
  • Naturgy
  • PowerGrid, India’s largest TSO
  • Saudi Aramco
  • and more.

Looking forward to seeing you in Seville!

Gero

entry.title: Re: Forecast Ratio Calculation is wrong at Fiscal Year Level
entry.content: Thanks @N1kh1l , Just to clear my side, is it possible to use both calculations same time – Calculation at Leaf members level for month and Calculate at the parent level for year in data action for same KF. I think it’s not possible either action will affect other. If parent level calculation value spread to leaf members, which will go wrong at leaf level. Regards, Vasu

entry.title: Re: Handling Unit Label Printing Through PPF in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi,

To trigger the HU PPF actions you would need to change something in the HU. Even if that is achieved, the field catalog of HU Printing does not have any field that deals with GR status changes. I feel this might become too big of a development.

entry.title: Re: I have a requirement to Sort the data based on the La...
entry.content: Issue Resolved

entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content:
It's a problem if you don't use sorted/hashed tables for the kind of operation you want to do, you'll get bad performance.

Can't you simply define a secondary key for your standard table articles?

I REALLY DON'T recommend this solution if articles is a standard table, but you can do it this way (VALUE, REDUCE, NEW):

VALUE #( FOR <production> IN productions
         LET article = REF #( articles[ ArticleId = <production>-ArticleId ] OPTIONAL )
         IN
         ( LINES OF COND #( WHEN article IS BOUND THEN ... ) ) )

entry.title: Re: Production Version
entry.content:
Hello Ravi, If your machine or work center having capacity constraints. then you can go lot size based production version, So that production version will be chosen depends on capacity or lot size which can machine produce.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Step-by-step guide to analyze HANA SQL traces in the local machine.
entry.content:
Hi @AndreyF,
thank you so much for your swift help. The missing module files did the trick.

It's running now (on Windows). 

Kind regards,
Jonas

entry.title: Re: Batch Managment
entry.content:
Hello Ravi, By looking at your requirement on batch selection.

You can choose/create your own batch during goods receipt by having this FM VB_CREATE_BATCH.

Or You can enter the own batch during GR by manually.

Regards

Prasath

Son Tran

open.sap.com seems to be offline/down...

entry.title: Patch Management practices for SAP ME Suite
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How often is it required to  apply security patches and updates to SAP ME Suite for addressing system discrepancies?

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP enhancement
entry.content:
Hello Dash,

What you installed is just Netweaver - a technical base of the system. Perfect for learning Basis, useful for Develpment and almost useless for modules. If this is enough for you, then you can consider also ABAP Platform Trial, which is base for the newer S/4HANA. You can check this post for an installation guide.

As it was mentioned you could use IDES system, which contains business logic, but from what I know there is no up-to-date version. Most probably this is a discontinued product. But you can doublecheck.

Most probably SAP S/4HANA 2023 Fully Activated Appliance would be suitable for you, but this is not free from what I know. You can check this.

But all depends on your requirements.

BR

entry.title: Re: Manual Reconciliation help for multiple BP
entry.content:
Hi,

As per my understanding, the payments of your incoming and outgoing are not tagged correspondingly with your invoices. 

If I can recommend it, it would be better if you could make the payments tagging with your invoices. Or else you can use EFMs for your payments. But yes, it would require development.

With Regards,

Samudra Gupta

entry.title: Multiple target fields mapping at once | Standard iFlow PostExit
entry.content:
Dear Integration / CPI fellows,

I am developing a PostExit for the standard C4C Mapping. In the standard mapping there are many of them where multiple (more than one target fields) are getting mapped. See screenshot. How is this possible?

entry.title: Re: Link for download media 51055918 for SQL server 2022
entry.content: I went to the path given to download the SQL Server 2022 media, but the folder is empty. I will contact the SAP account executive to request the license. Thanks for the feedback

entry.title: Re: BOM component selection
entry.content:
Hello Ravi,

To having flexible components at production activities try using alternative item group in BOM or you can use parts interchangeability methods. Other than this I don't think we have any methods for having flexible component selection. 

But in your scenario's It is advisable to use alternative BOM concepts to follow the standard process. Because it will be easy to access during MRP and consumption.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Anyone tell me , How to Export UI5 Screen as pdf file upon button click
entry.content: How to save UI5 Screen as Pdf File with multiple pages.

entry.title: Hierarchy with directory issue when sharing with other spaces
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In ADMIN Space : 

I created a hierarchical with directory and associated it with the Master Dimension. Then I associated the master dimension with the fact. so I created Analytics model from the fact and dispplay data.

I able to set hierarchy for Cost Center. then I share the fact, the masters and the hierarchy to HR space.

In HR Space :

I Created Analytics Model from the Fact and previewd the data.

I found below error 

I try to unshare the Hierarchy with Directory so that this space does not have a Hierarchy with Directory. Then I tried previewing data; it worked, but I couldn't set the hierarchy.

Do you have any solutions for this problem?

Its like Converting Opportunity to Inquiry. 

 

Thanks,

Raju

entry.title: Execute powershell command from SAP Fiori tile
entry.content:
Hi experts!

This is my first post in SAP Community. I would like to know if it is possible to execute a Powershell command from a tile in SAP Fiori.

Thanks in advance and regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Learning xAPI, Joule and OCN (LinkedIn Learning integration)
entry.content:
Hi Kristian,

I just needed a real expert like you. I am very grateful for your comprehensive answer. You helped me a lot in understanding the given topics. When analyzing Linkedin Learning, I also found that their suggested personalized learning paths are very powerful. I am doing my masters thesis in one company that currently uses SAP SF Learning as well as Linkedin Learning, but both software are not integrated to each other, which I see as a great opportunity for employee development specialists to monitor employee education directly in SAP as well as offering employees an expanded range of educational courses from LiL. I also found a way to connect both systems on the web, but I didn't know if SAP could collect data from Linkedin Learning.

Fortunately, someone like you was found and thanks to you I understood everything, for which I owe you my big thanks.

entry.title: Re: Party entitled to dispose XXXXXX is not allowed in wa...
entry.content:
I suspect this might have something to do with below configuration:

SCM EWM > EWM > Interfaces > ERP Integration > Goods Movements > Map Storage Locations from ERP system to EWM.

entry.title: Re: is open.sap.com down
entry.content: It is working fine for me

entry.title: Not able to open MII Transaction link in my windows PC, net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)
entry.content:
I am trying to read an MII Transaction through web service from my PC and I am getting the cors error. I am using ajax call for this. This I am trying to monitor the Dev server availability. I am passing the login username and password through the IllumLoginName and IllumLoginPassword and the link runs fine, I get this JSON output when I run this link directly in a browser. 

 

Also, I can open the link using window.open() and it opens fine. 

But when using the link in an ajax call, even with crossDomain:true,,, it returns this error. 

Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:5501' has been blocked by CORS policy: No 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is present on the requested resource.

POST https://vchgmesd251.na.int.grp:50001/XMII/Runner?Transaction=DEVTest/Transaction/serverCheckTest&OutputParameter=MessageSend&content-type=text/json&session=false&IllumLoginName=AS4432&IllumLoginPassword=Overhedd22 net::ERR_FAILED 200 (OK)

Is there any way to make it work? or are there any other solutions?

entry.title: Re: Unlock your supply chain potential with SAP Integrated Business Planning AI
entry.content:
Hi Laura, 

Thanks For Sharing Information. 

Is it possible to view the outcome of the Curve Clustering Profile after executing the Application Job? Alternatively, can we determine which products belong to each curve cluster?

entry.title: Re: Issue related with missing pricing procedure
entry.content: Yes, if at all you need to insert a condition type in a transaction, the same should be listed in the related pricing procedure; else, it is not possible to insert at transaction level.

entry.title: SRM_VE_GROUPING / SRM_VE_WEIGHTING with BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hello, we are missing the transaction SRM_VE_GROUPING / SRM_VE_WEIGHTING in BW4HANA. Does anyone have experience with this.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: RELATÓRIO DO RAZÃO
entry.content:
Olá, @LucasCarvalho 

Já experimentou quebrar esse relatório em períodos inferiores, como um mês por exemplo? Entendo que talvez necessite de um único relatório para o semestre, mas seria apenas uma forma de entender se o problema é gerado por falta de recursos da máquina ao tentar gerar o arquivo PDF.

Caso o problema ainda persista mesmo considerando períodos menores, você poderia testar a geração do arquivo através de uma outra máquina (outro usuário) ou até mesmo (se possível), acessar o SAP diretamente através do servidor e realizar os testes.

É relativamente comum que relatórios impressos ou até mesmo em tela derrubem o sistema quando se trata de uma quantidade de dados enorme. Aqui falamos na casa de centenas de milhares de linhas, como em contas de estoque por exemplo, a depender do ramo da empresa.

Espero que faça sentido.

Felipe

entry.title: Re: Related Party Logic on Import Declaration
entry.content:
Hi Jessica,

I recently came across the same issue while working on another GTS project for a customer.

The field for "Related Parties" or as it is called in the GTS Declaration "Affiliation" will appear on the Invoice tab of the declaration once you add an Invoice/Contrat (by clicking on the blank page to create the Invoice/Contract).

Hope this helps.

Mouaz

entry.title: Import of the SAP Best Practices of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 into SOLADM?
entry.content:
Since the SAP Best Practices Explorer is no longer available, where do I find the JSON file for Import of the SAP Best Practices of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 into SOLADM?

Best Regards

Colin Bacon

entry.title: Re: cl_gos_service_tools=>copy_linked_objcts works not on business objects
entry.content:
Hi there,

Will, all that calls, make the attachments appear into SRGBTBREL  table with type ATTA and id notif number? My problem is, only this kind of attachments are copied using cl_gos_service_tools=>copy_linked_objects, manual notification attachments (using QM02 for example) do not appear in SRGBTBREL table nor copied using copy link.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: MultiProvider/CompositeProvider scenario in Datasphere
entry.content: Thanks for your detailed response with pictorial representation, Martin! I really appreciate your help! So, my takeaway is - Use view for achieving the MP/CP functionality and associate all dimensions with texts manually with final FACT view.

entry.title: Master data retransfer from IBP to SAP ECC or S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear community,

did someone implement a master data retransfer from SAP IBP to S/4HANA or SAP ECC?

My use case is related to ABCxyz calculation which takes place in SAP IBP. The attributes would be also very useful on operational side to ensure a consistent view and to guarantee an aligned planning approach.

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: create inline a filter table with new abap syntax
entry.content: Thanks for you help. I'm wokring on BTP and the tables are all SAP Standard Tables, so creating a secondary key is no usefull option. How can I mark your comment as a correct answer?
